messages.content:
I can help with that, but I don’t have the ability to actually execute repository tasks from this chat.

If you want me to help with **load test task 3**, please send:
- the task 3 instructions, or
- the relevant command/output you want interpreted, or
- the code/config involved.

If you meant to have me change or run something in the project, please submit again with a concrete coding request (or turn off Chat-only mode if you’re using it).

nextActions.label: Continue chat
nextActions.description: Ask a follow-up question in the same thread.
